<!-- Thanks for contributing! Delete the sections that don't apply. -->

## What kind of change is this?

- [ ] Data: adding/updating a gym, event, competition, or store
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Data PRs only

- [ ] I followed the template in `src/BjjEire.Seeder/data/<entity>/_template.json`
- [ ] Coordinates are `[longitude, latitude]` (GeoJSON order)
- [ ] I can confirm the information is publicly available on the entity's own channels
- [ ] I am not an employee/owner of the listed entity OR I have disclosed that below

## Code PRs only

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck` passes (if frontend)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
